videos.title: HTML5 Semantic Elements - Main Element Explained
videos.description: A comprehensive explanation of HTML5 semantic elements including the <main> element, its purpose, and proper usage in document structure.

videos.title: HTML & CSS Crash Course - Semantic HTML
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers semantic HTML5 structure including header, nav, main, section, article, aside, and footer elements with practical examples.

videos.title: Why Use Semantic HTML Elements?
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains the importance of semantic HTML elements like <main> for accessibility, SEO, and code maintainability.

videos.title: HTML Main Element - What It Is and How To Use It
videos.description: A focused tutorial on the HTML <main> element covering syntax, best practices, common mistakes, and accessibility considerations.

videos.title: HTML5 Page Structure - The Main Element
videos.description: Learn how to structure an HTML5 page properly with the <main> element and understand the one-main-per-document rule.
